creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Before the system gets to the 'probing devices' screen, it should 
have displayed a menu with three choices for you, one of which 
is 'visual configuration' or similar.  Can you try choosing this 
'visual configuration', and then disabling (deleting) all devices 
which you know that you do not have in your system, so that there 
are no IRQ/DMA/whatever conflicts during probing?
